title: TreeSize won't renew perpetual-license support unless users subscribe
summary: Since 2025, JAM Software has been transitioning most TreeSize editions to subscription models. But even before it sold TreeSize subscriptions, JAM Software didn’t permanently retain every installation file and key after a customer’s support period ended, Christ said.
caption: output/2026-07-21/treesize-won-t-renew-perpetual-license-support-unless-users-subscribe.txt
